jsonLd.title: Droom is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Droom invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Meerut location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Droom:
Droom is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Droom!
